top_signals.title: ‘What's happening at the EF?’ Ethereum community looking for answers after high-profile departures
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Cybercrime service disrupted for abusing Microsoft platform to sign malware
top_signals.summary: Microsoft says it has disrupted a malware-signing-as-a-service (MSaaS) operation that abused the company's Artifact Signing service to generate fraudulent code-signing certificates used by ransomware gangs and other cybercriminals. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Thailand cuts visa-free stays, citing crime by foreigners
top_signals.summary: Tourism is vital to the Southeast Asian nation's economy, but foreign arrivals have yet to return to their pre-Covid highs.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
